items.text:
Introducing K.A Global© an Award Winning Production House and a innovative Creative Powerhouse, proudly established in the UK, operating at the forefront of the Entertainment Industry since 2020.
Specialising in Film, Music, Media, Performing Arts, and Events, we are more than a production company, we are a creative team built to develop, support, and elevate talents both on-screen and behind the scenes. 

Rapidly growing as a brand, K.A Global combines: 

🎥 Film Production & Creative Direction 

🎤 Music Production & Artist Development 

🎭 Talent Agency Hub/Casting Platform & Brand Coaching Development 

🎧 Audio & Videography Supply for Events 

📺 Content Creation for Streaming Platforms 

We are proud to be recognised as an Award Winning Creative Brand, with a mission to become a Global household name representing Excellence, Diversity, and Innovation. 

NOW RECRUITING – OPPORTUNITIES ARE OPEN FOR NEW APPLICANTS 

We are currently expanding and actively seeking: 

🎭 On-Screen Talents 

• Actors/Actresses

• Presenters

• Musicians/Recording Artists

• Models

• Dancers 

• Stunt Performers 

🧑‍🔧👨‍💻 Behind-the-Scenes Creatives 'Send Your Rates of Any of These Services You Do From This List' 

• D.O.P/Post Production Editors/Gaffers/Technitions 

• Fly Cam Drone Operators 'If You Own A Drone That is A Bonus' 

• Jib Crane Film Operators 'If You Own A Jib Crane That is A Bonus' 

• Film Producers/Production Runners/Line Producers 

• Recording Studio Sound Engineers/Mix & Mastering Experts/Film Score Music Composers 

• Film Sound Mixers 

• Photographers 

• Production Equipment Supplyers/Camera Rental Services 

• Film Production Financing Advisors 

• Assistant Directors 

• Personal Assistants 

• Administrators 

• Social Media Promoters/Analysts 

• Marketing Specialists 

• Public Relations 

• Motion Picture Digital Art Graphic Designers 

• Film Writers/Script Editors/Proofreaders/Script Developers 

• Journalists/Bloggers/Radio DJ Presenters 

• Costume Designers 

• Prop/Set Designers/Logistics 

• Hairstylists/Special Effects Makeup Artists 

• Entertainment Lawyer/Solicitors 

• Drivers 'Must Own Vehicle With Valid Licence' 

• Warehouse Film Studio Space 

• Building/Land Sight Health & Safety Inspectors 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Security Guard Officers 

• Film/Event Food & Beverage Catering Business Owners 

• Airspace Pilots 'With Valid Licence' 

• Luxury Vehicle/Car Hiring Services 

• Professional Film/Media Animal Hiring Services 

• Medical First Aid Professionals 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Stage Armoury/Weapon Firearms Prop Services 'With Valid Licence'

🎬 EXCITING ANNOUNCEMENT 

K.A Global is currently in development for a upcoming new TV Series in collaboration with Major TV Network Streaming platforms. 

This is your opportunity to be casted in our upcoming productions 

✨ Join a fast growing creative network 

✨ Build your portfolio & industry experience with credentials 

✨ Collaborate on high level visionary projects 

✨ Participate in Acting Classes

CONSIDERING IN JOINING WITH K.A GLOBAL? 

• Access to industry opportunities 

• Professional development & brand coaching 

• Exposed across Film, Music & Media platforms 

• A supportive, diverse and forward thinking creative community 

• Pathways to mainstream recognition 

To Register with us and become part of the growing database. Simply Apply via this Application Form Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSewCNCnx7MBV7HjOibA-Zwav1-cZ8cDtnzlRgZFDNkHev6w4A/viewform?usp=publish-editor 

Further Info About K.A Global is Available via The Page Links | 

Homepage: kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com 

Instagram: @kaglobalofficial 

Facebook: KAGlobalCastings 

YouTube: K.A Global Official 

StarNow: KAGlobal Castings 

Testimonials: https://youtu.be/QdEzUsT1P00?si=yPYZOzkLUEewD3Ek

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA / SZKLARSKA PORĘBA**

**Plan zdjęciowy – JESTED, CZECHY**

**13 -14 -15 kwietnia**

 

Do filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych pod roboczym tytułem „Kosmonauta” o znanym Polaku, **szukam Statystów**:

 

**13 / 14 / 15 KWIETNIA:**

**- STAND IN – **szczupli mężczyźni do 180 cm. Na stand inach ustawia się światło zamiast aktorów

13.04 dojazd do Jested we własnym zakresie na 6:20. Tutaj szukam panów z autem, którzy zabiorą jeszcze jedną osobę. Szukam 2 panów.

14.04 i 15.04 – transport z Jeleniej Góry. Również w roli wojskowych.

**Stawka 220 zł za dzień + zwrot kosztów paliwa**

 

**14 i 15 KWIETNIA:**

 - **WOJSKOWI –** mężczyźni ok. 18-50 lat – **na 14 i 15 kwietnia **(może być 1 dzień lub 2)

Zapewniamy transport z Jeleniej Góry.

14.04 wyjazd o 4:00 rano. Zdjęcia do ok. 16:30. **Stawka 180 zł**

15.04 wyjazd o 12:00. Zdjęcia do ok. północy. **Stawka 180 zł**

 

**Płatności gotówką po planie.**

 

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

** **

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

**MĘŻCZYŹNI:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy

obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark, wycięte

wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko

 

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JJ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
"Mechanic" for Short Film (20-30y/o)
Looking to cast a mechanic character for a short film. This scene would be shot either May 2 or 3, in a home garage. Should be a half day or less. It would not involve extensive use of tools, and is a pretty short dialogue scene. Bonus points if you have any experience working on cars at all, but not necessary.

Please message me if you're available and interested. This is a paid position located in Colorado Springs.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — AS THE LIGHT FADES

RDE Films is casting for a psychological crime thriller shooting this June in Colorado.

We’re looking for grounded actors who can live truthfully in heavy, character-driven material.

⸻

ROLES:

[YOUNG PROTAGONIST]
Black Male | 14–18
Quiet. Observant. Carrying more than he should.
Must be able to deliver a strong emotional scene.

⸻

[FATHER FIGURE]
Black Male | 40–60
Strong presence. Controlled. A man of few words.

⸻

[SOUTHERN LOCAL]
Caucasian Male | 30–40
Heavy Southern accent. Blue-collar. Brief physical altercation.

⸻

Send: Headshot, Resume, Reel (if available)
📩 Casting@Rdefilms.com
Subject: ROLE – NAME

Local hires preferred.

items.text:
**Casting: LA area locals.  ****Seeking families and friends to be contestants on a fun, family friendly game show.  **

A major brand is currently looking for fun, outgoing and excitable families and friends to be contestants on a gameshow shooting 30 minutes outside of downtown Los Angeles.  

All teams must be able to self-report to the location and be available on May 4th and potentially May 5th.

Teams must consist of at least two people and no more than five.  All scenarios are welcome. Families with children between 6 to 12 years old are encouraged to apply.  Participants will be eligible to win various prizes.

To submit, please email a note about your team along with a photo of everyone on the team as well as a telephone number and email address so we can reach out to you to make a brief 1-to-2-minute audition tape.  

Please email [ ](mailto:drivethrusurprise@gmail.com)[factcasting@gmail.com](mailto:factcasting@gmail.com)

Families with Kids Ages 6-12 Encouraged DETAILS: Filming 30 Minutes Outside Los Angeles Must Self-Report Late April Early May And 王 WHAT YOU GET: Win Awesome Prizes! Have Blast on TV! Make Great Memories! - HOW to APPLY: Email: factcasting@gmail.com factcasting Send: Group Photo & Contact Info! Tag Your Team & Apply Now!'

items.text:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

Liebe Filmemacher & Schauspieler, 

Wusstet ihr, dass sich auch die größten Schauspiellegenden regelmäßig coachen lassen? Doch nicht nur Schauspielcoaches sind populär... Auch Coaching für Drehbuchautoren und Regisseure werden immer präsenter. Vor allem in einer Zeit, in der am Set immer weniger geprobt wird. 

https://youtu.be/7B4lrd8Gq9c

Spannender Impuls von der Schauspielagentin Andrea Lambsdorff (Albrecht Schuch, Paula Beer, Tobias Moretti, etc.)

items.text:
Feature Film shooting a scene for Proof of Concept. 

 

80' Retro Punk and New Wave Looks

 

Synopsis - Ollie (Lead Character) walks into his shared apartment to find two uninvited guests. 

 

ALL ACTORS must have a Punk look or be willing to change their hair. 

 

Sabrina - Female - 18-26 - white/hispanic - obnoxious, loud

Snotrocket - Male - 20-32 - white/hispanic - abrasive, crude 

Levi - Male - 20-26 - white - square, nerdy 

Paid (negotiable), meal provided. 

 

Send an actor resume with headshot and video. We will get back to those submissions that generate interest. 

 

Austin, TX 

May 5th or 11th shoot date. TBD on DP availability. 

 

1 day of filming. Arri Alexa Mini LF video on 70's cinematic Cooke lenses. 

 

Proof of concept for investment solicitation to develop a feature film. Attached pics are stills from a previous shoot for the same project. 

 

Send all submissions to:

[thehoot@gmail.com](mailto:thehoot@gmail.com)

No photo description available.

topComments.text: Would you accept a 19 year old male?

items.text:
📍LA
Hi everyone,

We’re currently casting background extras for Nevermind (proof of concept shoot) and are looking for a vibrant, mixed group of people in their 20s–30s to reflect an authentic LA vibe.

Shoot Dates: May 1–3 (flexible depending on role)

Location: Los Angeles

Roles: Background extras (various scenes)

We’re looking for natural, expressive faces and diverse personalities; artists, creatives, students, professionals, anyone who feels like they belong in the world of contemporary LA.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FEMALE ATHLETE (20s)

Hey everyone!

I’m a sports media graduate student developing a mock Nike-style women in sports marketing campaign for my storytelling portfolio.

This is a non-affiliated conceptual project (not officially connected to Nike), created to explore high-level sports branding, cinematic storytelling, and women in athletics.

Project title:
“She Was Never Just One Thing”

I am looking for a female athlete in her 20s who is comfortable performing multiple sports/athletic movements, including (but not limited to):
* Soccer / field drills
* Football or rugby-style catching / contact movement
* Track / sprinting
* Basketball drills / movement
* Boxing (bag work or shadowboxing style movement)
* Basic hockey stickhandling (or athletic simulation movement)
* Martial arts / taekwondo-style movement (experience preferred but not required)

You do NOT need to be elite in all sports, I'm more so looking for:
* Strong athletic ability
* Confidence in movement on camera
* Comfort performing cinematic/choreographed sports action
* Strong presence and energy

This is a portfolio / collaboration project
Actor will receive:
* $150 in compensation for the total work
* Full credit in final release
* Footage for personal reel use
* Tagged promotion across social platforms
* Exposure as part of a cinematic sports storytelling piece

I will also be linking my website + portfolio in the post.

If interested, please shoot me an email at anaselenax@gmail.com (my website/portfolio is also anaselenax.com)
* A short intro
* Any sports background
* Photos or video (if available)

Looking forward to building something powerful and visually impactful.

(No on camera dialogue, strictly voiceover to match the feel of a Nike Campaign)

🎬🎼 Jesteś reżyserem na początku swojej drogi i chcesz lepiej zrozumieć, jak pracować z muzyką w filmie? 

👉 Rusza nabór do prestiżowych warsztatów FMF Young Talent Award Master Classes, w których skupiamy się na jednej z kluczowych relacji w procesie twórczym – współpracy reżyser – kompozytor.

👉 Muzyka potrafi całkowicie zmienić sposób odbioru filmu. Podczas warsztatów dowiesz się, jak świadomie wykorzystywać jej potencjał i jak skutecznie komunikować swoją wizję kompozytorowi.

🎓 Warsztaty poprowadzi Miriam Cutler – trzykrotnie nominowana do nagrody Emmy kompozytorka, producentka i wieloletnia mentorka związana z Sundance Film Festival.

👉 Udział jest bezpłatny, a zajęcia odbywają się w języku angielskim.
📅 Na zgłoszenia czekamy do 12 kwietnia 2026. 
👉Link do formularza - https://kbf-ankieta.limesurvey.net/294954?lang=pl

🤝 Współorganizatorem konkursu FMF YTA jest Bettermaker
🤝 Partner konkursu: Wytwórnia Filmów Dokumentalnych i Fabularnych

--------

🎬🎼 Are you an early-career director looking to better understand how to work with music in film? 

👉 Applications are now open for the prestigious FMF Young Talent Award Master Classes, focusing on one of the key creative relationships in filmmaking – the collaboration between director and composer.

👉 Music has the power to completely transform how a film is perceived. During the workshops, you will learn how to consciously use its potential and how to effectively communicate your vision to a composer.

🎓 The workshops will be led by Miriam Cutler – a three-time Emmy-nominated composer, producer, and long-time mentor associated with the Sundance Film Festival.

👉 Participation is free of charge, and the workshops will be conducted in English.

📅 Applications are open until April 12, 2026
👉 Application form: https://kbf-ankieta.limesurvey.net/294954?lang=pl

🤝 The co-organizer of the FMF YTA competition is Bettermaker
🤝 Competition partner: WFDiF

items.text:
**Casting Call**

**No Budget Project**

**Title:** *The Human Error*

**Genre:** Drama / Social Realism
**Duration:** 20 minutes

**Filming Location** : Berlin

**Timeframe** :  July-August 2026

**Synopsis:**
When a routine home visit by a youth welfare officer spirals into a devastating misunderstanding, a loving family is thrust into a bureaucratic storm. In Berlin’s quiet suburbs, Anja and Ben White — caring parents to their eight-year-old daughter Kyra — suddenly find themselves accused of neglect due to a misinterpreted situation at school. The case manager, Claudia Berger, driven by procedure and her own past trauma, makes a well-intentioned but misguided decision that tears the family apart.

As the investigation deepens and the children’s welfare bureaucracy grinds forward, the truth struggles to surface. The film mirrors the painfully slow machinery of the system versus the emotional immediacy of human relationships. Through restrained cinematography and intimate dialogue, *The Human Error* explores how compassion can be buried under regulation — and whether one can ever undo the damage caused by a single wrong judgment.

**Main Cast :**
* **Anja White (young Mother)** – *27 years old*: empathetic but increasingly desperate, she represents the quiet strength of motherhood under pressure.
* **Ben White (young Father)** – *28 Years old*: a calm, analytical father losing faith in the system but fighting for his family.
* **Claudia Berger (Youth Welfare Officer)** – *40 years old*: meticulous and moral, but haunted by her own experiences, embodying the tragic flaw of the “human error.”
* **Kyra  White (Child)** – 7*-9 years old*: innocent and observant, her perspective bookends the film — from trust to confusion, to a fragile reconciliation.

**Tone and Style:**
Naturalistic and emotionally charged, with muted color grading and documentary-style camerawork. Music is minimal, focusing instead on ambient sound to heighten realism. The closing scene brings quiet redemption — Claudia realizes her error, but the family’s trust in the system remains irreparably changed.

sharedPost.text:
Title: Cyborg

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : No budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026
Apply with your profile /pics /showreel to : Preyaanishi@gmail.com 

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast (suggested):

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

CASTING CALL

Für unsere Independent-Webserie "Trag Mich" sind wir noch auf der Suche nach einem Hauptdarsteller im Raum Stuttgart.

Zum Projekt:

Die Webserie umfasst fünf Folgen à 20 Minuten und handelt von einer Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe Anfang zwanzig, die den Verlust eines gemeinsamen Freundes durch Suizid verarbeiten muss. Dabei geraten die Figuren in intensive Gespräche über Schuld und Verantwortung.

Zu besetzen ist die Rolle „Constantin“:

Groß, sportlich, kurze Haare, tiefe Stimme, engagiert und politisch organisiert. Ein Charakter, der lieber handelt, als über seine Gefühle zu sprechen. Das fällt ihm besonders schwer, seit seine kleine Schwester Suizid begangen hat.

Bewerbungen an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com

items.text:
Stunt-Trained Actress Kirstin Weiser actionactress casting video 

Kirstin Weiser presents an intense trailer excerpt here from a much larger action trailer that is still being edited. You are seeing a scene full of pressure, attack energy and presence, performed directly toward the camera and the viewer. 

This video does not show a finished full trailer, but a single excerpt from a larger trailer project with Kirstin Weiser that is currently still in the editing process. That is exactly what makes this moment so exciting, because even this one scene already carries the precise energy that matters in action, crime and thriller. 

Kirstin Weiser runs toward her opponent with an iron rod, toward the camera and therefore directly toward the viewer. This instantly creates pressure, threat, tempo and a strong physical presence. It is exactly this direct attack dynamic that makes the scene cinematically effective and interesting for casting, production and directing. 

Kirstin Weiser is a versatile actress who should be considered far beyond action, crime and thriller. She moves convincingly, expressively and powerfully on camera in almost every facet, and can carry toughness, emotion, vulnerability, tension and presence with equal strength. This exact versatility makes her especially valuable for casting, directing and production, because Kirstin is not limited to one type, but is an exciting strong choice for different genres and role profiles. 

Anyone looking for actresses for intense, conflict-driven and physically demanding roles will get a first clear impression here of Kirstin’s impact. This clip is deliberately meant as a preview of the larger trailer that is currently still being worked on. 

If you are looking for strong female profiles for action, crime or thriller, this is already worth watching now. 

Write in the comments which format this scene works best for in your view: action film, crime series or thriller? 

Subscribe to the channel if you want to see the final trailer as well, and share this excerpt with people in casting, directing or production. 

In which genre does this trailer excerpt work most strongly for you: classic action film, dark thriller or hard TV crime drama? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerExcerpt #ActionTrailer #Crime #Thriller

items.summary:
Stunt-Trained Actress Kirstin Weiser actionactress casting video 

Kirstin Weiser presents an intense trailer excerpt here from a much larger action trailer that is still being edited. You are seeing a scene full of pressure, attack energy and presence, performed directly toward the camera and the viewer. 

This video does not show a finished full trailer, but a single excerpt from a larger trailer project with Kirstin Weiser that is currently still in the editing process. That is exactly what makes this moment so exciting, because even this one scene already carries the precise energy that matters in action, crime and thriller. 

Kirstin Weiser runs toward her opponent with an iron rod, toward the camera and therefore directly toward the viewer. This instantly creates pressure, threat, tempo and a strong physical presence. It is exactly this direct attack dynamic that makes the scene cinematically effective and interesting for casting, production and directing. 

Kirstin Weiser is a versatile actress who should be considered far beyond action, crime and thriller. She moves convincingly, expressively and powerfully on camera in almost every facet, and can carry toughness, emotion, vulnerability, tension and presence with equal strength. This exact versatility makes her especially valuable for casting, directing and production, because Kirstin is not limited to one type, but is an exciting strong choice for different genres and role profiles. 

Anyone looking for actresses for intense, conflict-driven and physically demanding roles will get a first clear impression here of Kirstin’s impact. This clip is deliberately meant as a preview of the larger trailer that is currently still being worked on. 

If you are looking for strong female profiles for action, crime or thriller, this is already worth watching now. 

Write in the comments which format this scene works best for in your view: action film, crime series or thriller? 

Subscribe to the channel if you want to see the final trailer as well, and share this excerpt with people in casting, directing or production. 

In which genre does this trailer excerpt work most strongly for you: classic action film, dark thriller or hard TV crime drama? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerExcerpt #ActionTrailer #Crime #Thriller

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer und ich, wenn Erfahrung sichtbar wird - Wo Bühne, Buch, Kamera und Verantwortung einander begegnen 

Wenn Haltung auf Begegnung trifft 

Dieses Foto zeigt für mich weit mehr als nur ein Interviewmoment. Es zeigt meine Begegnung mit Ralf Scharrer, einem Menschen, der Schauspiel, Schreiben, Design, Moderation und gesellschaftliches Engagement auf besondere Weise verbindet. Genau dort entsteht auch für mich als Christian Weiße ein echter Sinn, weil mediale Arbeit dann besonders wertvoll wird, wenn sie Haltung trägt. 

Vom Erleben zum Erzählen 

Ralf Scharrer steht für Mut, Wandel und Verantwortung. Seine Lesungen, seine Radio Show, Scharrer TV, sein Buch Dem Wahnsinn entkommen und seine Arbeit mit Aktiv gegen Stalking machen deutlich, dass er nicht nur sichtbar sein will, sondern etwas bewegen möchte. Aus persönlichen Tiefschlägen hat er eine öffentliche Kraft gemacht, die anderen Orientierung, Trost und Mut geben kann. 

Wo sein Weg und mein Tun sich verbinden 

Genau hier erkenne ich die Symbiose zwischen uns. Ich arbeite seit Jahren mit Kamera, Interviews, Storytelling, Filmproduktion, Social Media und redaktioneller Sichtbarkeit. Ralf bringt Inhalte mit Tiefe, Erfahrung und gesellschaftlicher Relevanz, ich bringe die mediale Umsetzung, das Gespür für Wirkung und die Fähigkeit mit, solche Themen glaubwürdig nach außen zu tragen. 

Wenn aus Inhalt Wirkung wird 

So wird aus einem gemeinsamen Foto mehr als Erinnerung. Es wird zu einem Zeichen dafür, wie Kunst, Unternehmergeist, Aufklärung und mediale Reichweite zusammenfinden können. Ralf gibt Themen Stimme, ich helfe dabei, dass diese Stimme gesehen, gehört und weitergetragen wird. Genau in solchen Begegnungen liegt für mich der wahre Sinn meiner Arbeit. 

Welche Themen mit echter Haltung und persönlicher Tiefe sollten heute aus Deiner Sicht viel stärker öffentlich erzählt werden? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeiße #AktivGegenStalking #Storytelling #Karrideo

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.

https://form.jotform.com/septemberdaniels97/voices-from-another-stage

Chloe, you’ve done amazing so far but you now need your parents or guardians to approach agents to represent you. No money should change hands and you can have head shots taken on iPhone to start. Simple headshots ( look at Spotlight) for advice. You will have to join spotlight once you join an agency .
Look at spotlight for a light of reputable agencies and keep doing what you’re doing and be yourself. Good luck and have fun ⭐️🎬
For those suggesting she ask her parents, that is a male profile presumably her father's putting out the request.

items.text:
Do serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Łukasz Romaniuk (36) – Gwałciciel, typ sfrustrowanego samotnika, który wykorzystuje zasypiające w jego aucie, wstawione kobiety. Ma prawo jazdy. Ciemna kurtka, dżinsy. PRAWO JAZDY!
Data: 1.05
Stawka: 600 zł netto

- Lijewska (22) – Jedna z ofiar gwałciciela. Ładna blondynka, ale raczej spokojna. Ubrana na wyjście na miasto, modnie. Kolorowe spodnie, top i kurtka. 
Data: 1.05 i 2.05
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za dwa dni

- Mama Uli (53) – Matka zgwałconej kobiety, bardzo przejęta losem córki. Elegancka, raczej zamożna. Sweter i dżinsy. 
Data: 30.05 i 2.05
Stawka: 800 zł netto za dwa dni

- Ewa (28) – Barmanka, typ pewnej siebie dziewczyny. Rozważna i konkretna. Skórzana kurtka, spodnie i koszula zawinięta wokół pasa.  
Data: 1.05
Stawka: 500 zł netto

- Zurab (41) – Kierowca na przejazdach z gruzińskim/kazachskim/ormiańskim (w tekście: Gruzin) pochodzeniem. Wydaje się groźny, ale w rzeczywistości dobry człowiek. Mówi po polsku, ale z akcentem. Ma prawo jazdy. Spodnie i kurtka letnia. PRAWO JAZDY!
Data:30.04
Stawka: 600 zł netto

- Kolega Zuraba (45) – Kolega poszukiwanego. Kierowca na przejazdach z gruzińskim/kazachskim/ormiańskim pochodzeniem. Mówi po polsku, ale z akcentem. Prawko nie wymagane. Spodnie i kurtka letnia
Data: 30.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Menadżer (43) – odpowiedzialny za klub, pomaga policji. Spodnie i marynarka
Data: 1.05
Stawka: 400 ł netto

- Iga (22) – Koleżanka zgwałconej dziewczyny, typ studentki. „Idol look” – podkolanówki, spódniczka, sweterek.
Data: 30.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Nastolatek (15) – Nieuważny, z dużymi nausznymi słuchawkami, ubrany modnie jak na ten wiek (13,14) EPIZOD
Data: 30.04
Stawka: 300 zł netto

- Kasia (27) – Dziewczyna, która prawie padła ofiarą gwałciciela, jednak w porę się zorientowała. Rozważna, skłonna do działania. Spodnie i kurtka dżinsowa. 
Data: 30.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Klubowiczka (23)  - dziewczyna z klubu. 
Data: 1.05
Stawka: 300 zł netto

- Bramkarz (34) – dobrze zbudowany, ale z lekkim brzuszkiem. Pewny siebie, ma się za cwaniaka.  
Data: 16.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.
Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

Kraków, szukam ludzi do spektkalu
Do spektaklu niezależnej grupy teatralnej na podstawie autorskiego scenariusza szukam aktorów (niekoniecznie profesjonalnych), którzy wcieliliby się w role:

Tadeusz (dwudziestokilkuletni, poeta, były więzień Oświęcimia, postać tragiczna. pierwowzór - Tadeusz Borowski)

Krzysztof (dwudziestokilkuletni, poeta, wrażliwy, szlachetny, postać tragiczna, pierwowzór - K.K. Baczyński)

Stary doktor (sześćdziesięcioletni, zmęczony życiem, pedagog, doktor, pierwowzór - Janusz Korczak)

Wolf (oficer niemiecki, popadający w obłęd)

Przewidziana premiera: wrzesień lub październik 2026, projekt w założeniu niekomercyjny, ale nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może to zaprowadzić. Zachęcam do zgłoszeń. Pozdrawiam.

Wolf (oficer niemiecki, popadający w obłęd)

Przewidziana premiera: wrzesień lub październik 2026, projekt w założeniu niekomercyjny, ale nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może to zaprowadzić. Zachęcam do zgłoszeń. Pozdrawiam.

sharedPost.text:
SUNDAY 12th APRIL 

We’re back this Sunday with another fantastic open mic night at the drop inn ! 

Here are some videos from Easter Sunday ! 
In the first video we have Henry on the guitar. He sang us some classic tunes while he also played his guitar. He is very talented! ( he even took requests!) this is his tik tok link down below 👇 

@henry.james.music

The second video, as it was a special occasion 🐣, we have my niece Lyla singing Naughty from Matilda the Musical. An unreal performance, had the audience cheering very loud !! 👏

A big thank you to everyone who got up to sing you were all fantastic and I hope to see you at the open mic again soon ! 

The crowd loved it that much and didn’t want it to stop so I kept singing for an extra 1hr !!! 🥳

Are you a performer ? 

- singer 
- poet 
- musician 
- Comedian 

Come on down to my open mic evening and show off your talents ! It has been well attended since I started a few weeks ago and I hope to keep growing the supportive community!! 

I hope to see you this Sunday at 3pm to show off your skills 🎶🎙️

The Drop Inn at Last Drop Village Hotel & Spa

items.text:
In the episode 42 of Beyond Reel Talk podcast I speak to Akie Kotabe. He is a Japanese-American actor known for The Batman, Andor, Silo, Gran Turismo and Mad Men.

In this episode, we talk about growing up in America with Japanese roots, how he got into acting, and what it takes to build a long career in the industry.

Akie shares his experience of living in Los Angeles as a working actor, dealing with rejection, casting, and how an acting career often means constant hustle and a lot of sacrifice. We also talk about theatre, his experience working with Michael Shannon and Ruth Wilson, as well as voice work and screen acting.

We also get into working on projects like Cyberpunk 2077, Andor, Silo and The Batman — including his experience working with Common on Silo, what those sets were like, how certain roles came about, and which projects stayed with him the most.

items.text:
Aspiring Actor Looking for Opportunities 🎬

Hi everyone,
My name is Nathan Craft, also known as MC Crafty, and I’m looking to break into acting.
I’m based in Cambridge (originally from Essex) with a natural London/Essex accent. I’m happy to travel anywhere as I drive.

About me:

37 years old
6ft 2, slim build, bald
Mixed race (White & Black Caribbean)
Confident, energetic, and very outgoing
Not camera shy – I thrive in front of people

Although I haven’t had formal acting experience yet, performance has always been a big part of my life. I’m an MC/rapper, writing my own lyrics and performing at clubs and parties across the UK and internationally (Latvia & Switzerland), as well as live-stream radio shows.

In my day job, I manage a telesales team where I regularly deliver motivational talks and keep energy levels high — I’m known as a real “Mr Motivator” type. I also write my own scripts, so learning lines and bringing them to life is something I’m very comfortable with.

I’m looking for any acting opportunities — whether that’s TV, film, adverts, music videos, or stage — to get my foot in the door and prove what I can do.
If anyone is casting, knows someone, or can point me in the right direction, I’d really appreciate it 🙌

Nathan Aka Crafty Aka MC Crafty

POWERHOUSE CASTING IS SEEKING TALENTED FEMALE SOCCER PLAYERS AGES 15 TO 17 FOR A SOCIAL MEDIA COMMERCIAL

We're looking for GREAT female soccer players ages 15 to 17 for a social media commercial campaign!
Compensation if you're booked & used in the commercial is $6175.00 + CAD 

This is a NON UNION job. If you have an agent, please ask them to submit you over Breakdownexpress

***Everyone must be legally over the age of 15 & a resident of Canada to participate

Important dates:
Callbacks: Wednesday, April 22, 2026
Life Cast Fitting Date: April 27 or 28, 2026
Wardrobe: May 6, 7, 2026
Rehearsal: May 8, 9, 2026
Shoot: May 11 - 13, 2026 Shooting in the Greater Toronto Area
***Travel & accommodation will be paid if anyone resides outside of Ontario

PLEASE HELP US SPREAD THE WORD!
ALL SUBMISSIONS ARE DUE NO LATER THAN 9:00AM EST ON MONDAY, APRIL 20, 2026

SUBMISSION LINK:
https://femalesoccerplayers.castingcrane.com/

sharedPost.text:
💍 I Do, Maybe? — Official Animation Series Trailer

The past has a way of interfering with the future…

When love feels right, but history refuses to let go, every choice becomes harder—especially when a child is involved.

Do you sacrifice your happiness to hold a family together?
Or do you choose peace… even if it means letting go?

And when the past comes back—
will you let it ruin your future with Monica?

🎬 A W.T. Jones Studios Production
📺 Streaming Soon

www.youtube.com/@W.TJonesNetwork

Watch how this all plays out in the upcoming episodes.

Casting for Voiceover Roles for Characters.  Send acting resume, headshots to wt_jones_studios@yahoo.com.    Subject- Voiceover " I Do, Maybe"

Join our team-  Editors, Production Assistants, Etc.   

#IDoMaybe #AnimationSeries #DramaSeries #RomanceDrama #ComingSoon #WTJonesStudios

items.text:
CASTING: DJ Performer (No DJ Skills required)

Seeking a performer to portray a DJ for a set on the night of April 18th. This is a performance role with a pre produced set, no technical DJ experience needed.

Looking for someone with strong presence who can convincingly embody a DJ in a staged live setting. Confidence, a nonchalant attitude, and natural movement are key.

Requirements:
Comfortable on camera or performing in front of an audience.
Strong sense of presence.
Able to take simple direction.

items.text:
SYNOPSIS

​The Catalyst of Greed
Human greed is the ultimate pathogen. Dr. Anawin, a renowned entomologist, finds his life’s work sabotaged when a foreign research team infiltrates his lab. Driven by a sinister agenda, one of the researchers infects Anawin’s insect specimens with a forbidden synthetic compound—a cocktail of rabies and undisclosed toxins designed by Thanatorn, a ruthless pharmaceutical mogul. Thanatorn’s plan is simple but deadly: create a controlled outbreak to sell the high-priced cure.

I'm interested in co-production.with any country

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – Belfast short film**

Hi everyone, I’m currently casting *The Building’s Not Empty*, a short fiction film I’m making as part of my MA in Film at Queen’s University Belfast.

We’re looking for performers for 4 roles in a film set at Riddel’s Warehouse in Belfast. Acting experience is welcome, but not essential. Belfast / Northern Ireland accents are needed for some roles.

This is a **volunteer project**, but **transport will be paid**. Filming will take place in **May** in Belfast.

Please see the flyer for character details and how to apply.
Feel free to share with anyone who might be interested. 

Thank you!

items.text:
LOOKING FOR ON SITE ASSISTANCE FOR THIS PROJECT: 

Hey again everyone!

I’m a sports media graduate student currently developing a mock Nike-style women in sports marketing campaign as part of my storytelling and creative portfolio work.

This is a non-affiliated conceptual project (not officially connected to Nike), but it is designed to match the tone, visual style, and emotional storytelling of high-end sports brand campaigns.

The project is titled:
“She Was Never Just One Thing” 

It follows a multi-sport female athlete (soccer, basketball, football, taekwondo, boxing, hockey, etc.) and explores identity, pressure, and breaking athletic limitations.

I’m currently looking to collaborate with:
* Video editors (short-form + cinematic style)
* Assistant editors / post-production help
* Motion graphics / text designers
* Anyone interested in sports storytelling / branded content

This is a portfolio-building collaboration project
All contributors will receive:
* Full creative credit
* Portfolio / reel usage rights
* Tagging in final release
* Shared exposure when posted across platforms (including tagging Nike)

I’ll also be linking my website + portfolio below.

If you’re interested in collaborating or want more details, feel free to shoot me an email at anaselenax@gmail.com

My website is anaselenax.com

Excited to build something powerful with other creatives  (I'll also be looking for any actors to fulfill this role, so ill be posting this on different facebook acting groups- any help is genuinely appreciated)

INNOVAID søger 2 drenge og 2 piger i alderen 4 - 6 år 

Vi søger 2 drenge og piger i alderen 4 - 6 år som medvirkede til optagelse af reklamevideo og billeder til et nyt spændende legetøjskoncept som vi lancerer.
Børnene skal lege med legetøjet, og der vil ikke indgå lysoptagelæser/ replikker.

Optagelserne vil foregå i Skødstrup nord for Aarhus – torsdag d. 9. april kl. 14 - 16 eller søndag d.12. april kl. 10 - 12. 
Det er ulønnet, vi tilbyder dog en mindre gave i forbindelse med deltagelse i optagelserne.
Skriv pb hvis du er interesseret!

items.text:
Hej, mam w kwietniu/maju wolne terminy i szukam zleceń/pracy w produkcji filmowej.
Jestem absolwentem warszawskiej szkoły filmowej (organizacja produkcji filmowej i TV).

Doświadczenie zbierałem podczas pracy przy filmach, serialach, reklamach i teledyskach.

Mogę pracować przy produkcji i rozwoju projektów audiowizualnych, jako wsparcie producenta lub kierownika produkcji, w biurze produkcyjnym, a także w obszarze postprodukcji, montażu wideo oraz tworzenia materiałów graficznych i contentowych.

Znam proces produkcji filmowej, potrafię koordynować zadania, prowadzić dokumentację oraz wspierać zespoły realizacyjne.

Mogę także tworzyć teksty: artykuły, posty, materiały koncepcyjne i informacyjne związane z filmem, reklamą, kulturą oraz sztuką.

Forma współpracy: etat / praca dodatkowa / staż | zdalnie / hybrydowo / stacjonarnie (Warszawa) 

Będę wdzięczny za wszelkie oferty.

items.text:
STATYŚCI- OPEN CALL 

Cześć! Realizujemy III roczny film krótkometrażowy w Szkole Filmowej w Łodzi. Na planie niezbędni będziecie Wy! Poszukujemy statystów do odegrania scen w barze azjatyckim.

Dla zbudowania klimatu filmu i baru goście są bardzo istotni :)

ROLE:

- Dziewczyna w kącie, czytająca tomik poezji

- Mężczyzna w garniturze, intensywnie myślący, patrzący w stolik je makaron, czasem się uśmiecha.

- Dwóch chłopaków w przerwie na obiedzie.

- Trzech czarnoskórych mężczyzn, którzy wspólnie się śmieją i klepią po plecach.

- Stare małżeństwo siedzące w ciszy. Czasem na siebie ciepło spoglądają.

- Trzy osoby o urodzie azjatyckiej.

INFORMACJE PRAKTYCZNE:

Kiedy: 6.05 (szukamy także paru statystów na 7.05)

Godziny: Wstępnie 8-16 (do doprecyzowania bliżej terminu)

Gdzie: Łódź

Wyślij proszę swoje zdjęcie, miejsce dojazdu, dyspozycyjność (6/7?) oraz numer telefonu wraz z mailem w wiadomości prywatnej. 

Oferujemy ciepły posiłek oraz dokumentację fotograficzną z planu.

ZAPRASZAMY NAJSERDECZNIEJ!

topComments.text: to w świetle prawa wygląda jak nielegalna praca

items.text:
[PILNE] CASTING – ROLE DRUGOPLANOWE + Gaffer/osoba do pomoc (NON-PROFIT) 🎬
Zegar tyka, a my domykamy obsadę! Robimy "JALAPEÑO 2" - autorski, krótkometrażowy kryminał gangsterski. Na co dzień żyjemy z produkcji komercyjnej, po godzinach robimy gęste, gatunkowe kino z mrocznym klimatem (low light, dym, zieleń w kadrze).
Moodboard i opis:
https://app.milanote.com/1VOPeW1ObDcLdb?p=nGhwX8xtxUL

Sprawa jest mocno ASAP-owa. Część ról wchodzi na plan już za 3 dni (**17 kwietnia**)! Szukamy też gaffera lub po prostu osoby chętnej do pomocy w zdjęciach z pionu operatorskiego.

**Kogo szukamy (ważne role, 1-2 sceny):**
**Gang kibiców:**
* **Zbigniew**: [powyżej 40 lat, trener boksu, członek gangu pseudokibiców]. ZDJĘCIA: **[17.04]**
* **Mirosław**: [20-40, bokser, członek gangu pseudokibiców]. ZDJĘCIA: **[17.04]**
* **Radosław**: [20-40, bokser, członek gangu pseudokibiców]. ZDJĘCIA: **[17.04]**
* **Wąski**: [20-40, bokser, członek gangu pseudokibiców]. ZDJĘCIA: **[17.04]**

**Reszta:**
* **Don Perdere**: [powyżej 40 lat, szef włoskiej mafii, typowy mafiozo, którego się każdy boi ]. ZDJĘCIA: **[23.04 oraz 24.04]**
* **Vincenzo**: [20-40 lat, włoski gangster, ochroniarz Pazzo (głównego antagonisty), pojedyncze kwestie]. ZDJĘCIA: **[23.04 - 26.04]**
* **Policjant**: [20-50 lat, typowy policjant, 1 scena, ale z dwoma głównymi postaciami]. ZDJĘCIA: **[26.04]**

**Co rzucamy na stół (projekt non-profit):**
* **Materiał do showreela:** Staramy się zrobić to dobrze i estetycznie. Dajemy pełny dostęp do surowego materiału i zmontowanych scen.
* **Plan bez chaosu:** Pracujemy na semi-pro sprzęcie. Mamy ogarnięty harmonogram i szanujemy Twój czas, mimo wariackiego tempa.
* **Pełne zaplecze:** Ciepły catering i hektolitry kawy. Nikt nie gra na głodniaka.

📍 **Lokalizacja:** Głównie Kraków (dojazdy do dogadania).

**Zgłoszenia:** Wyślij w wiadomości prywatnej: krótkie info o sobie, zdjęcia i showreel / wizytówkę wideo. Działamy błyskawicznie – przeglądamy i odzywamy się na bieżąco! Scenariusz wyślę na priv.

Wrzucam parę referencji, oraz pierwsze kadry z naszej produkcji (wstępnie pokolorowane)

items.text:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

items.summary:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

items.text:
Liebe Filmemacher & Schauspieler, 

Wusstet ihr, dass sich auch die größten Schauspiellegenden regelmäßig coachen lassen? Doch nicht nur Schauspielcoaches sind populär... Auch Coaching für Drehbuchautoren und Regisseure werden immer präsenter. Vor allem in einer Zeit, in der am Set immer weniger geprobt wird. 

https://youtu.be/7B4lrd8Gq9c

Spannender Impuls von der Schauspielagentin Andrea Lambsdorff (Albrecht Schuch, Paula Beer, Tobias Moretti, etc.)

items.text:
CASTING NATIONWIDE!

Hi, all! I'm casting a new trivia game show with a strategic twist for a MAJOR network! Contestants will face off answering trivia questions, and every correct answer lets you choose a block to add to your tower.  It’ll take skill and strategy to stack your blocks and win the game!

Fill out the application today, so my team can book you for an interview as early as tomorrow. You must have a valid passport that doesn't expire this year! We're shooting in Portugal! Get ready to have FUN!! Here is the application link.  

https://pitmancastinginc.formstack.com/forms/gameshow_spring_2026_dan

Attached is the flyer we've been sending out but please follow the above link to apply. Thanks and hope to see you on the show!

Apply at: TriviaCasting.com com * Terms and Conditions apply * *This offer of femployment *Must be At least 18yrs 18yrs.old. old.'

items.text:
Hey everyone — I built something and wanted to share it with you all.

It's called **Virtual Reader**. You paste in your script, pick your character, and AI reads every other role out loud so you can rehearse the full scene — alone, at any hour, no scene partner needed.

I'm a SAG actor here in LA. I built this because I needed it.

🎬 See it in action: [https://youtu.be/Fc5lFp2A-xM](https://youtu.be/Fc5lFp2A-xM)

👉 karlozactor.gumroad.com/l/virtualreader

Mac only right now. Happy to answer any questions! 🎭

🎬 CASTING CALL: IDENTICAL TWINS (GIRLS, 10–12)

We’re scouting identical twin girls across South Africa for an upcoming paid feature film shooting in Cape Town (June–September 2026).

✨ Requirements:
• Identical twin girls
• Ages 10–12
• Mixed race / ethnically ambiguous look
• Must have a valid SA or international passport (travel to Belgium required)

This is an exciting international opportunity for young talent to be part of a major production 🌍

📩 To apply:
Email: studio@zestcasting.com

Include:
• Recent photos of both twins
• Names & ages
• Contact details
• Where they are based

⏰ Deadline: 13 April 2026

Tag parents, friends, schools, or agents who might know the perfect twins! 

#twins #southafrica #casting #featurefilm #capetowncasting #zestcasting

🎬 CASTING CALL 🎭
Für ein No-Budget Comedy/Sci-Fi Kurzfilmprojekt rund um eine etwas chaotische Engels-WG suchen wir noch motivierte Schauspieler:innen!  

📍 Drehort: Nürnberg + ca. 60 km Umgebung  

Wenn du aus der Region kommst – oder bereit bist, für Proben und Drehs auch mal etwas Strecke auf dich zu nehmen – melde dich gern! Da wir uns regelmäßig treffen, ist eine gewisse Verfügbarkeit wichtig.  

Egal ob mit Erfahrung oder einfach Leidenschaft fürs Schauspiel:  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! ✨

**Casting Call: Female Actors (20-30) – Sisters**

Looking for **two female actors, ages 20-30**, to play sisters in a **small scene** for my **directing class final**. No experience needed—this is a **fun, low-pressure way to try acting** and **get **on-set** experience**.

Perfect for anyone who wants a **small role to add to their portfolio**! The scene is **short and simple**, focusing on the sisters’ interaction.

**Date:** Needed **this Friday**
**Location:** Emily Carr University of Art and Design

Email ochenderson@hotmail.com if you’re interested. **All levels welcome. Thank you!**

Self Representation: ACTORS HAVE CHOICES WE JUST HAVE TO STEP BACK TO SEE THE SIGNS

As an actor who's now in the self-representation pool after my agent closed their agency. I'm no stranger to the feeling of ‘what now’?. But what's the most difficult thing about being an actor in this industry? ……..

#agent #seekingrepresentation #actor #acting #actingindustry

Full article: 👇🏼

items.text:
Quick question for filmmakers/casting directors..

Have you ever posted a casting call across multiple platforms and ended up with hundreds (or even thousands) of submissions scattered across emails, DMs, and different sites?

It gets messy fast, things get lost, and reviewing becomes overwhelming.

I’m currently building something to simplify this by bringing all submissions into one organized place where you can review, shortlist, and track everything easily.

I’m testing it with live projects right now and setting up custom submission links for casting calls so everything comes in structured instead of chaotic, completely free while I’m in this testing phase.

If you’re about to post a casting call and want to try it, I’m happy to set it up for your project.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL **- Short Film (Travel and Lunch expenses covered)

We’re looking for actors to play these three roles, a brief description is shown on the casting leaflet below. If you need more details of the characters please email [eviehopgood@gmail.com](mailto:eviehopgood@gmail.com). 

**The story: **

A young woman (Maura) and her newly estranged siblings (Michael and Ana) attempt to stay connected when they are held apart by vices of addiction and supernatural circumstances.

**How to Audition:**

If you are interested in auditioning for any of the three roles: **Michael**,** Ana** or the **Angel. **Please email [eviehopgood@gmail.com](mailto:eviehopgood@gmail.com). And we will provide you with the necessary audition requirements. 

**Disclaimers:**

* The  role of the Angel must be comfortable with having a bare chest. Actors of all genders are welcome to audition and arrangements can be made due to comfortability level. 
* These roles are unpaid however, transport and food will be covered while on set.
* Must be able to commute to the shooting location (Osmington,Weymouth)

items.text:
UWAGA !!!   PILNE !!!   WARSZAWA !!!   GLINIARZE !!!

Do kwietniowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiety do roli:

Dorota (30 - 40 lat) – przemęczona, nadużywająca alkoholu matka trójki dzieci. Pogubiona, nie zna umiaru. Kocha dzieci, ale przez alkohol i złe wzorce ze swojego dzieciństwa, nie potrafi się nimi odpowiednio zająć. Lekko rozmazany makijaż, średnio świeże włosy.  
 
Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

UWAGA !!!   PILNE !!!   WARSZAWA !!!   GLINIARZE !!!
Do kwietniowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

Suchy (26) – młody, zagubiony. Nie skończył szkoły i nie mógł znaleźć pracy, dlatego wpakował się w szemrane interesy. Nie zdaje sobie sprawy, kim jest Bizon i czym tak naprawdę się zajmuje. Kocha dzieci swojej siostry, nie mógłby porwać żadnego dzieciaka. Przyjemny w odbiorze. 

KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia

Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

Bizon (42) – szef szajki. Niebezpieczny, choć niepozorny. Dawniej prawie poszedł siedzieć za handel ludźmi, czuje się bezkarny, nikt nie może udowodnić mu winy. Skupiony na sobie i swoim biznesie, z nastawieniem po trupach do celu. Szczupły i wysoki.

Data: 23. kwietnia

Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Casting do NOWEGO 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie!
9 ról, fajne stawki!!!! Można się zgłaszać do więcej niż jednej roli, jeśli się pasuje 🙂 Więcej informacji o tym, jak się zgłosić, gdzie i do kogo, na samym dole.

1) Konstanty Kubicki   (34) – projektant wnętrz, ofiara próby zabójstwa. Przystojny, męski, podoba się kobietom, zadbany, ubiera się w stylu smart casual – swetry z golfem, dobrze skrojone spodnie. Kulturalny, uczynny wobec sąsiadów, profesjonalista w swoim fachu. Ma romans z zamężną sąsiadką Aleksandrą.   

scena: 1

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 28.04

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

2) Ryszard Malisiak (41) – mąż Aleksandry, sprawca próby zabójstwa Konstantego, jego sąsiad. Mocno zbudowany mężczyzna o surowych rysach, ubiera się w wygodne ubrania, flanelowe koszule, niezbyt o siebie dba. Zraniony zdradą żony, pełen żalu, że zaufał „dobremu sąsiadowi”. Mściwy, zdolny do przemocy pod wpływem emocji.. - KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

sceny: 1,3,4,21,22,23

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 28.04

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

3) Aleksandra Malisiak (37) – żona Ryszarda, sąsiadka i kochanka w jednym Konstantego. Atrakcyjna brunetka, dba o siebie, ubiera się kobieco i schludnie. Zestresowana, rozdarta między strachem przed mężem a uczuciem do Konstantego. Szantażowana przez Oskara. 

sceny: 3,4,16,17,17A,20,21

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 28.04

Stawka: 600zł na rękę 

4) Sebastian Gawron (29) – były pracownik Konstantego, alkoholik. Zaniedbany mężczyzna, z kilkudniowym zarostem. Agresywny pod wpływem alkoholu, pełen żalu do byłego szefa.  

sceny: 5-OFF,6,8

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 29.04

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

5) Arnold Serwata (45) – były przestępca (siedział za paserkę), partner Patrycji, klient Konstantego. Masywny, umięśniony mężczyzna z tatuażami, ubiera się w dresy i złoty łańcuch. Wybuchowy, zazdrosny, przekonany o zdradzie Patrycji, nie może sobie z tym poradzić, to dla niego straszna ujma. 

sceny: 10,11-OFF,12

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 29.04

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

6) Patrycja Kotowska (32) – partnerka Arnolda. Atrakcyjna blondynka o zmysłowej sylwetce, ubiera się prowokacyjnie – obcisłe jeansy, głęboki dekolt. Pewna swojego wyglądu, przyzwyczajona do męskiej uwagi. 

sceny: 10,11-OFF,12,13

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 29.04

Stawka: 600zł na rękę 

7) Oskar Czerwiński (24) – sąsiad z osiedla, szantażysta. Wysoki, szczupły młody mężczyzna o sprytnych ruchach, ubiera się w sportowe ciuchy – dresy, sneakersy. Cwaniak, wykorzystuje wiedzę o romansie do wyłudzenia pieniędzy. Zadłużony, desperacko potrzebuje gotówki. Szybko biega.

sceny: 3,4,17,17A,18,19

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 28.04 i 02.05

Stawka: 1200zł na rękę 

😎 Sąsiadka (60) – chętnie przy tuszy, lubi wszystko wiedzieć. 

sceny: 3,4

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 28.04

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

9) Klaudiusz Kotwa (28) – kolega Sebastiana, szczupły dresik, boi się policji 

scena: 6

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 29.04

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

10) Klientka (30-40) – tylko OFF, klientka Konstantego

scena: 1-OFF

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 28.04

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:

* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube

* aktualne zdjęcie

* wiek, wzrost, wagę

* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 

* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
🎭 MALE IMMERSIVE PERFORMER NEEDED – PAID OPPORTUNITY (£400) 🎭

Hi all! I’m Avgi, founder of Genome Theatre – we create high-end immersive and interactive experiences (murder mysteries, bespoke events, luxury parties).

We’re currently casting a male performer for an event on 25th April.

This is NOT a standard acting role – we’re specifically looking for someone with immersive / interactive performance experience.

You must be:
– Confident leading and presenting to groups
– Strong at improvisation and guest interaction
– Able to build atmosphere and “hold a room”

items.summary:

Hi all! I’m Avgi, founder of Genome Theatre – we create high-end immersive and interactive experiences (murder mysteries, bespoke events, luxury parties).

We’re currently casting a male performer for an event on 25th April.

This is NOT a standard acting role – we’re specifically looking for someone with immersive / interactive performance experience.

You must be:
– Confident leading and presenting to groups
– Strong at improvisation and guest interaction
– Able to build atmosphere and “hold a room”
– Experienced in immersive theatre & events.

Details:

We’re also actively growing our performer team, so this could lead to regular paid work.

items.text:
We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

Just a quick reminder to please bring:
🥪 A packed lunch
💦 Water
If you have a Majestic uniform, please wear it.
For new students, please come dressed in black or as close to black as possible.

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'We re excited to welcome you to our ACTING FOR SCREEN PROFESSIONAL WORKSHOP Learn essential on- on-camera acting techniques Work with scripted scenes from an original t pilot Explore natural, grounded performance for screen Film selected scenes in professional setting This workshop is designed for actors who want to: Build confidence on camera Develop subtle, truthful performances Experience working on original screen material Scene work in pairs Direction & feedback On-camera filming experience Limited spaces available We' re looking forward to working with you. AJESTIC'

I'm fine with putting all my other details in but parents are hesistant for me to put personal things in such as passport info - is this a safe and legitimate site which could genuinely help me ?? Has anyone used this ??

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Exclusive 1-on-1 Acting Workshop (Online)shorter version.

This is a practical, immersive acting course designed to help you become truthful, emotionally connected, and confident on camera.

I’m a British Cinematographer/Director with 30+ years experience and 30+ feature films, working with actors across the world.

🎯 What you’ll gain:• Real emotional depth (not “pretend acting”)• Strong, believable performances on camera• Understanding how film sets actually work• Confidence working with directors and crew• Material for your showreel

🎭 How it works (4 sessions):We focus on:• Moment-to-moment acting• Emotional connection & character work• Camera technique & performance• Real scene work + feedback

Everything is practical and tailored to you—not theory.

💰 4 sessions (1 hour each)Total: $200

This isn’t about tricks—it’s about truth in performance.

If you’re serious about acting, this will change how you approach it.

Let me know if you’d like to start 👍

* aktualnymi zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki

sharedPost.text:
La vie n’est pas une course contre le temps. Elle est une rencontre avec soi-même.  
Elle nous appelle à cultiver la connaissance intérieure, la sagesse, l’union et la stratégie pour avancer avec justesse.

C’est dans cet esprit que la danse Gogbahoun prend tout son sens : un chemin de recentrage, d’ancrage et d’alignement profond.  
Chaque mouvement devient une parole du corps, chaque rythme une clé pour se reconnecter à l’essentiel.

Venez vous ressourcer. Venez vous aligner.  
Car l’éveil spirituel n’est pas un luxe… il est une nécessité pour toute véritable évolution personnelle.

items.text:
INNOVAID søger 2 drenge og 2 piger i alderen 4 - 6 år
Vi søger 2 drenge og piger i alderen 4 - 6 år som medvirkede til optagelse af reklamevideo og billeder til et nyt spændende legetøjskoncept som vi lancerer.

Børnene skal lege med legetøjet, og der vil ikke indgå lysoptagelæser/ replikker.

 

Optagelserne vil foregå i Skødstrup nord for Aarhus – torsdag d. 9. april kl. 14 - 16 eller søndag d.1. april kl. 10 - 12.

Det er ulønnet, vi tilbyder dog en mindre gave i forbindelse med deltagelse i optagelserne.

Skriv pb hvis du er interesseret!

items.text:
SØGER STATISTER PÅ 7-9 år🎥

📆Dato: 24/3 - 2026

⏰Tid: kl. 14.30 - 16.15ish

🏘️Sted: Rollespilshytten Hareskov, Ballerupvej 93, 3500 Værløse 👕'Kostume': Almindeligt tøj til vejret - vi har låne spejder tørklæder

Lidt om hvad og hvorfor:🌻Projekt 'Sammen om fritid' har til formål at oplyse om, hvordan fritidstilbud i Danmark med få greb bedre kan inkludere flere, der lever med usynlig handicap. Som en del af det er vi lige nu i gang med at lave nogle små film, der skal være med til at vise hvad de aktivitetsansvarlige i fritidstilbuddene konkret kan gøre.

🌳En af vores film tager udgangspunkt i en spejderkontekst. Vi har vores 8-årige hovedperson, MEN vi mangler nogle statister, der kan spille hans holdkammerater i spejdergruppen. Det kræver ikke man har spejdererfaringer, men man skal være frisk på at indgå i et par meget simple scener, hvor man sidder og er igang med at snitte i en pind, og så bliver bedt om at rejse sig og mødes et andet sted. 

Selve filmen har et budskab om, at det er vigtigt at gøre indholdet fleksibelt, så flere kan være med på deres både. 

Filmen bliver kun ca. 1,5 minut lang i sidste ende, og kommer til at ligge på hjemmesiden www.sammenomfritid.dk (lanceres først d. 1/5) samt på diverse SoMe-kanaler.

👉Hvis du har spørgsmål eller vil melde dit barn til, så skriv til mig på mma@videnomhandicap.dk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'VIL DIT BARN VARE STATIST I EN OPLYSNINGSFILM? ١ SAMMEN OM FRITID BLIK FOR BLIKFORALLE ALLE'

🎬 CASTING CALL — HARD KNOTS 🎬

We're building something real out here in ATL.

Hard Knots is an original one-hour street drama set on Atlanta's Westside. Season 1 is in production and we are NOW looking for talent.

📍 Set in Atlanta, GA
🎭 All roles. All backgrounds.
🔞 Rated R — this one ain't for everybody
💰 Unpaid / Deferred Compensation

If you got the look, the hunger, and the range — we want to hear from you.

📩 Send us a DM with your name, age range, headshot, and reel.

Let's make history. ATL, this is for us. 🖤

#HardKnots #CastingCall #ATL #Atlanta #IndieFilm #StreetDrama #ActorsOfATL #AtlantaFilm #BlackFilm #NewSeries #CastingATL

items.text:
**Authentic Character Portraits | Eastbourne & Sussex 📸**

I'm a Sussex-based photographer moving away from "perfect" studio filters to focus on **honest, high-definition headshots** for actors and models.

My goal is to capture your 'casting type' exactly as you are—focusing on active eyes and real textures that meet **Spotlight standards**. No heavy airbrushing, just great light and genuine connection.

**What I’m offering:**
* Studio & Cinematic Street sessions in Eastbourne.
* A relaxed environment to get those "blank canvas" looks agents love.
* Quick turnaround for 2026 pilot season/graduates.

I’m looking for **3 more faces** this month to build out this authentic style for my portfolio. I'm offering a significantly reduced rate for these sessions.

**Comment 'INFO' below or DM me to grab one of the 3 spots!**

items.text:
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!
ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL, REAL PLAY!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here -

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS UNDER £15! 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
Hi everyone, I hope you’re all doing well.

I’m currently looking for a private room in Downtown Vancouver. I’m a clean, respectful, and disciplined person, working part-time as a delivery driver.

But more than just a place to stay, I’m searching for the right environment. I’m deeply passionate about acting and the film industry, and I truly believe that the people around you shape who you become. If I live with five actors, the sixth will be me—learning, growing, and improving every single day.

I’m someone who believes in mutual growth. If anyone has questions, feels curious, or just wants to connect, please don’t hesitate to reach out. I’m always open to learning from others, and I’d be more than happy to share whatever I can as well.

If you know of any available room or opportunity, I would truly appreciate your support. Thank you so much 🙏

sharedPost.text:
Now Casting For ...
"The Land" an Upcoming TV Series!
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting Background EXTRAS for the upcoming Hulu Series "THE LAND" filming in the Cleveland, OH area TWO DAYS from  April 27 - 28th.

*THIS WILL BE A PAID OPPORTUNITY!!*

This project will be taking place in the Cleveland, Ohio Area.

We will NOT be casting minors. Adult only submissions, please!

**IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a two day shoot, but talent will likely only work ONE day. Day one will be a Day Shoot. Day two APRIL 28th IS A SPLIT SHOOT. Split Shoot means the scene will start in the late afternoon and finish in the middle of the night!

Please read carefully below for details!
DETAILS:
Project: TV Series 'The Land'

Filming Location: Cleveland,Ohio Area (MUST WORK LOCAL)

Shoot Date(s): 4/27 & 4/28 (Talent will likely only work ONE day)

BG Extra Rate: $120/8
Trained Driver Rate: $120/8 + $150 bump

sharedPost.text:
“Maduming Lambat” — sa bawat hila ng lambat, hindi lang isda ang sumasama, kundi ang bigat ng katotohanang unti-unting nalulunod ang Laguna Lake sa polusyon. Isang makapangyarihang kwento ng kabuhayan, kalikasan, at panawagan—hanggang kailan tayo mananahimik? 🎥🌊

Archives Production presents "Maduming Lambat", an official 𝗱𝗼𝗰𝘂𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘆 entry to the 𝗕𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗱 𝗦𝗶𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗙𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗮𝗹 2026. Screening on 𝗔𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗹 22 at 𝗦𝗦𝗕 𝗛𝗮𝗹𝗹 and 𝗔𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗹 23 at 𝗟𝗶𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗿𝘆 2𝗻𝗱 𝗙𝗹𝗼𝗼𝗿, LSPU-SCC

A documentary by 𝙇𝙚𝙭𝙩𝙚𝙧 𝙎𝙖𝙗𝙖𝙧𝙚𝙨

Written by 𝙅𝙪𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙣 𝙆𝙚𝙣𝙣𝙚𝙩𝙝 𝙃𝙖𝙜𝙤𝙨, 𝙈𝙖𝙧𝙮 𝘾𝙡𝙖𝙞𝙧𝙚 𝙀𝙨𝙘𝙧𝙞𝙗𝙖, 𝙇𝙚𝙭𝙩𝙚𝙧 𝙎𝙖𝙗𝙖𝙧𝙚𝙨, 𝙅𝙤𝙝𝙣 𝘾𝙝𝙧𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙤𝙥𝙝𝙚𝙧 𝘿𝙖𝙜𝙡𝙚

🎟️ Tickets are now available. Contact the production team for inquiries.

𝙉𝙤𝙩𝙚: 𝙏𝙝𝙞𝙨 𝙞𝙨 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙗𝙖𝙨𝙞𝙨 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙋𝙚𝙤𝙥𝙡𝙚'𝙨 𝘾𝙝𝙤𝙞𝙘𝙚 𝘼𝙬𝙖𝙧𝙙. 𝙑𝙚𝙧𝙞𝙛𝙞𝙚𝙙 𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣𝙨 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙫𝙞𝙚𝙬𝙨 𝙞𝙣 𝙁𝙖𝙘𝙚𝙗𝙤𝙤𝙠 𝙖𝙧𝙚 𝙘𝙤𝙪𝙣𝙩𝙚𝙙. 𝘿𝙚𝙖𝙙𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙚 𝙪𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙡 𝘼𝙥𝙧𝙞𝙡 21, 11:59𝙋𝙈.

items.text:
FEMALE MODELS – CASTING ALERT

SCJ Entertainments is seeking confident and dynamic female talent for an upcoming luxurious international lingerie brand shoot in Miami, USA.

This project includes a high-end ad film and a premium photoshoot, requiring strong on-camera presence, elegance, and confidence.

Project Details
Location: Miami Beach, Florida, USA
Dates: 20th June – 22nd June 2026
Remuneration: USD 15,000 + Travel & Accommodation

Casting Requirements
Age: 18–40 years
Height: 5’3” and above
Physique: Lean / Normal / Athletic / Chubby (proportionate vitals)
Nationality: Open (valid passport required)
Skin Tone: Open

If you do not fit the above criteria but are interested in other types of shoots, we have multiple opportunities available. Feel free to connect with our team.

Important Information
The shoot will be conducted under a legal contract
Campaign Usage: Worldwide

Apply / Contact
project@scjentertainments.com
+91 9310676627 | 022 69647361
