Introducing K.A Global© an Award Winning Production House and a innovative Creative Powerhouse, proudly established in the UK, operating at the forefront of the Entertainment Industry since 2020.
Specialising in Film, Music, Media, Performing Arts, and Events, we are more than a production company, we are a creative team built to develop, support, and elevate talents both on-screen and behind the scenes. 

Rapidly growing as a brand, K.A Global combines: 

🎥 Film Production & Creative Direction 

🎤 Music Production & Artist Development 

🎭 Talent Agency Hub/Casting Platform & Brand Coaching Development 

🎧 Audio & Videography Supply for Events 

📺 Content Creation for Streaming Platforms 

We are proud to be recognised as an Award Winning Creative Brand, with a mission to become a Global household name representing Excellence, Diversity, and Innovation. 

NOW RECRUITING – OPPORTUNITIES ARE OPEN FOR NEW APPLICANTS 

We are currently expanding and actively seeking: 

🎭 On-Screen Talents 

• Actors/Actresses

• Presenters

• Musicians/Recording Artists

• Models

• Dancers 

• Stunt Performers 

🧑‍🔧👨‍💻 Behind-the-Scenes Creatives 'Send Your Rates of Any of These Services You Do From This List' 

• D.O.P/Post Production Editors/Gaffers/Technitions 

• Fly Cam Drone Operators 'If You Own A Drone That is A Bonus' 

• Jib Crane Film Operators 'If You Own A Jib Crane That is A Bonus' 

• Film Producers/Production Runners/Line Producers 

• Recording Studio Sound Engineers/Mix & Mastering Experts/Film Score Music Composers 

• Film Sound Mixers 

• Photographers 

• Production Equipment Supplyers/Camera Rental Services 

• Film Production Financing Advisors 

• Assistant Directors 

• Personal Assistants 

• Administrators 

• Social Media Promoters/Analysts 

• Marketing Specialists 

• Public Relations 

• Motion Picture Digital Art Graphic Designers 

• Film Writers/Script Editors/Proofreaders/Script Developers 

• Journalists/Bloggers/Radio DJ Presenters 

• Costume Designers 

• Prop/Set Designers/Logistics 

• Hairstylists/Special Effects Makeup Artists 

• Entertainment Lawyer/Solicitors 

• Drivers 'Must Own Vehicle With Valid Licence' 

• Warehouse Film Studio Space 

• Building/Land Sight Health & Safety Inspectors 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Security Guard Officers 

• Film/Event Food & Beverage Catering Business Owners 

• Airspace Pilots 'With Valid Licence' 

• Luxury Vehicle/Car Hiring Services 

• Professional Film/Media Animal Hiring Services 

• Medical First Aid Professionals 'With Valid Certificate' 

• Stage Armoury/Weapon Firearms Prop Services 'With Valid Licence'

🎬 EXCITING ANNOUNCEMENT 

K.A Global is currently in development for a upcoming new TV Series in collaboration with Major TV Network Streaming platforms. 

This is your opportunity to be casted in our upcoming productions 

✨ Join a fast growing creative network 

✨ Build your portfolio & industry experience with credentials 

✨ Collaborate on high level visionary projects 

✨ Participate in Acting Classes

CONSIDERING IN JOINING WITH K.A GLOBAL? 

• Access to industry opportunities 

• Professional development & brand coaching 

• Exposed across Film, Music & Media platforms 

• A supportive, diverse and forward thinking creative community 

• Pathways to mainstream recognition 

To Register with us and become part of the growing database. Simply Apply via this Application Form Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSewCNCnx7MBV7HjOibA-Zwav1-cZ8cDtnzlRgZFDNkHev6w4A/viewform?usp=publish-editor 

Further Info About K.A Global is Available via The Page Links | 

Homepage: kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com 

Instagram: @kaglobalofficial 

Facebook: KAGlobalCastings 

YouTube: K.A Global Official 

StarNow: KAGlobal Castings 

Testimonials: https://youtu.be/QdEzUsT1P00?si=yPYZOzkLUEewD3Ek

items.title: CASTING CALL:

items.text:
**ULTRA SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**NON-UNION - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“GOODBYE, FROM AFAR”***

**Director:** Kevin Jin Kwan Kim

**Producers:** Michael Ren, Bianca Rose Cheung, Nushi Sharma

**Category:** Ultra Short 1-Minute Film - Independent

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Compensation:** Paid honorarium ($100). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** May 23-24, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable).

**LOGLINE:** A young Korean kid navigates the death of a loved one from abroad, as his mother’s unspoken grief fractures their family.

**MINSEO **- ***Korean, Male, age 7–9*****.** Quiet, observant kid. He doesn’t fully understand what’s happening around him, but he feels all of it. He’s the kind of child who notices when the mood in a room changes, even when nobody says anything out loud. This role has minimal dialogue so the performance really lives in his face, stillness, and reactions. ****Korean-speaking preferred.*** ***MAIN.***

**MOM **- ***Korean, Female, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s mother. She’s carrying fresh grief while trying to hold herself together for her son. She moves through the day like someone split in two, doing what needs to be done, but emotionally somewhere else. Though she is in a state of deep sorrow, she does her best to keep it bottled up in front of her family. ****Must be fluent in Korean. SUPPORTING.***

**DAD **- ***Korean, Male, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s father. Calm, warm and steady, he is trying his best to keep the family afloat while his wife is falling apart. He’s gentle with Minseo and quietly supportive of Mom, but you can feel the weight on him too.*** *Must be fluent in Korean.*** ***SUPPORTING.***

**CHILD VERSION OF MOM **- ***East Asian, Female, age 7–9.*** A child version of Mom, appearing in the final emotional turn of the story. This role is brief but important. Looking for a young actor who can display deep sorrow in a natural, grounded performance.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID NON-UNION COMMERCIAL - Vancouver/Hope BC **

Romer Media is casting for a commercial shoot to be filmed on 

**April 13th** near **Hope, BC**.

**THREE FRIENDS**
Male or female, 20s
Fun, outgoing, energetic individuals. Talent do not need to know each other. We are simply looking for people with strong natural energy and comfort on camera.

**MOTHER**
Female, 30s–40s
Warm, natural, relatable, with a genuine on-camera presence. Looking for someone who can convey a strong and believable connection with a child.

**CHILD**
Male or female, approx. 5–8 years old
Playful, expressive, and comfortable outdoors. We are looking for a natural presence rather than polished performance.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* **Compensation:** $500/day
* **Non-union**
* **Shoot Date:** April 13th
* **Location:** Near Hope, BC
* **Mileage paid**
* **Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation**
* Talent will be required for one shoot day
* This is an outdoor lifestyle commercial
* No dialogue required unless otherwise noted
* No acting experience necessary

**SUBMISSION MATERIAL**
Please email the following to **[pieter@romermedia.com](mailto:pieter@romermedia.com)**:
* Recent photo(s)
* Name, age, and where you are based
* A short note about yourself
* Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle

We are casting for a commercial shoot filming near Hope, BC on April 13th.

ROLES:
Mother (30s–40s)
Child (approx. 5–8 years old)
Three friends (20s, male or female)

For the mother and child, we are looking for a warm, genuine connection.
For the friends, we are looking for individuals in their 20s who are fun, outgoing, and energetic. They do not need to know each other.

items.text:
Spaces have become available for our upcoming Demidov Two Day Intensive in May! 

This Two Day Intensive will introduce actors to Demidov’s unique approach to accessing our inner freedom, cultivating our intuition, perception, spontaneity, and ability to surrender fully to our inner urges and the truth of our experience in the moment.

Over the course of this weekend, we will discover how to orient ourselves in the circumstances of a given text and to surrender to them fully. We will learn how circumstances become ‘given’, and how they become clearer and deeper every time we repeat a scene. We will learn to let ourselves be driven by the force of circumstances, rather than forcing ourselves to do, think or feel anything. In this way, living as character becomes effortless and spontaneous.

This Intensive is for actors both new to the Demidov work, and also for those who would like to go deeper into it.

The Demidov Organic Acting Technique empowers actors to connect deeply with their unique creative individuality by guiding them to recognise and trust their innate artistic instincts. It is an approach that cultivates faith in the actors’ own talent and foster spontaneous performances that emerge organically, allowing actors to consistently access inspiration and fully express their true creative potential.

Click the link  below to read more and email us at office@demidovstudiolondon.com with any questions!

https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com/courses/demidov-two-day-intensive-may26

~

Demidov Studio London

The UK’s only certified Demidov Acting School

Located at Pushkin House, 5a Bloomsbury Square, London WC1A 2TA

[demidovstudiolondon.com](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fdemidovstudiolondon.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExNkVmWFJZaXpDNDJHQkRXWHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6bALS4v1MVzf-LWkhJMHb9XkoU9vPjkD9X_LhJ4V7Pmy2xE2EO02XcLLXQuA_aem_SWbG67TaLWtasfTk-bbM9g&h=AT7VYr6tG0OrvJjy_Fr4fgsCD2iWTUa9Zn-obhn9HgzIp1tzdDkdIZd3Mp1Sq2r_1AW8kQxEdto6cgRZ8rJfh_ZT-7PPctxTPvl59NHX-Aw-5xdS_tzr15BsrBF2bi6z6edJIFl8yNpCRIj6&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT5hs1DayFQ2Fp6txP_B8qTqDUH12OTXtBaWIThal-fT3aL0kIpRRwnMB1S_DZGKRn_Yt2dW7FXZzNDeSNDIKsutCPl5dGzmJIaYKDYmm36uW9e2yMcoaOlU4DIsBYiQfX_KiUJ6wp7e3In82q37ipW6ft_ZxdkaRsj9hZdYfxqKP6_GsZFTJMMKIF8fxe_10uST8dj0FEP7-ygRx2UJVL9xbQ)

items.summary:
Spaces have become available for our upcoming Demidov Two Day Intensive in May! 

This Two Day Intensive will introduce actors to Demidov’s unique approach to accessing our inner freedom, cultivating our intuition, perception, spontaneity, and ability to surrender fully to our inner urges and the truth of our experience in the moment.

Over the course of this weekend, we will discover how to orient ourselves in the circumstances of a given text and to surrender to them fully. We will learn how circumstances become ‘given’, and how they become clearer and deeper every time we repeat a scene. We will learn to let ourselves be driven by the force of circumstances, rather than forcing ourselves to do, think or feel anything. In this way, living as character becomes effortless and spontaneous.

This Intensive is for actors both new to the Demidov work, and also for those who would like to go deeper into it.

The Demidov Organic Acting Technique empowers actors to connect deeply with their unique creative individuality by guiding them to recognise and trust their innate artistic instincts. It is an approach that cultivates faith in the actors’ own talent and foster spontaneous performances that emerge organically, allowing actors to consistently access inspiration and fully express their true creative potential.

Click the link  below to read more and email us at office@demidovstudiolondon.com with any questions!

https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com/courses/demidov-two-day-intensive-may26

~

Demidov Studio London

The UK’s only certified Demidov Acting School

Located at Pushkin House, 5a Bloomsbury Square, London WC1A 2TA

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – Belfast short film**

Hi everyone, I’m currently casting *The Building’s Not Empty*, a short fiction film I’m making as part of my MA in Film at Queen’s University Belfast.

We’re looking for performers for 4 roles in a film set at Riddel’s Warehouse in Belfast. Acting experience is welcome, but not essential. Belfast / Northern Ireland accents are needed for some roles.

This is a **volunteer project**, but **transport will be paid**. Filming will take place in **May** in Belfast.

Please see the flyer for character details and how to apply.
Feel free to share with anyone who might be interested. 

Thank you!

Ej, WIARA !

Już 17 kwietnia, czyli JUŻ W TEN PIĄTEK w mieście Ostrów Wielkopolski w ramach trasy '' Niezła Czopka'' zagra legendarna kapela sceny Hard Core Rap Nagły Atak Spawacza... 

Tym, którzy są fanami polskiej Rap Gry od samego początku, nie cza ich przedstawiać. Bezkompromisowy styl, gwałt na cenzurze i żywe jak krew opowieści z betonowych osiedli miasta Poznań. 

N.A.S to żywe Legendy, więc jeżeli uważasz się staro szkolnym kotem? to widzim się przy barze i pod sceną, ponieważ me n my homiez, czytaj MC Sigma NGWM n DJ Ysiu także tam zagrają Yo. ✊

..a cały ten proceder będzie miał swoje kuriozum w Rancho Ostrów - Karaoke & Pub przy WROcławskiej 35/20 w Ostrowie Wlkp.

items.text:
Does your child shine at home, but struggle socially around other kids?
The team behind The Dog House is making a brand new BBC series about childhood friendship and we’re looking for kids aged 5 to 8 who are finding it hard to make friends. If this sounds like your child - or someone you know - we’re filming in July/August, 2026 and would love to hear from you.

Apply at: https://bemyfriend.tv/

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'BBC Is your child finding it hard to make friends? The award-winning makers of The Dog House are casting for α brand-new BBC series about friendship. We are looking for children aged 5 to 8 from all over the UK who need little help navigating the world of friendship. Over three days, a team of child psychologists will help them build the social skills and confidence to make real, lasting connections with other kids. If you'd like to help your child make a new friend (with no pressure to take part), please apply at: bemyfriend.tv ロ.キ」'

**CASTING CALL – MUSIC VIDEO SHORT FILM**
**“SNIFFING OUT TROUBLE”**
From ThunderKnight Entertainment Ltd.

Casting for the high-energy music video follow-up to the feature film *HEAVY WEAPON*.

We are seeking **female actors (ages 18–50)** with **basic dance experience** for a stylized, story-driven scene set inside a dance studio, where investigators uncover clues tied to a mysterious crime.

🎬 **What You Get:**
• IMDb credit
• Gas stipend
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

🔥 This is a dynamic, cinematic shoot blending performance, movement, and storytelling — perfect for talent looking to expand their reel with something bold and visually striking.

📩 **To Submit:**
Send headshot + contact info to: **Thunderknightltd@gmail.com**
📱 Or text: **720-569-7460** for details

CASTING!!!!!

S.E.B. Casting is casting real families to be in a PSA for the National Forest Foundation. 

Looking for authentic families of 4-5. 
2 Parents between 30-45, 
2 children between 4-8, or one boy between 8-10 & one girl between 11-13 plus her best friend same age 
1 Grandparent over 50 (if available)
Also looking for a family dog! 

Ideal candidates are fun loving, comfortable, friendly, enjoy the outdoors, but do not need to be super athletic or ultra granola types, just regular families who like to go into the forest for a fun day or weekend. All types! All ethnicities! No film or television experience necessary! 

Pay rate is $1400 per person 

Usage is: 60 plus :30, :15, :4 x :06 LIFTS
Terms: One year from first use date, May 16, 2026. Usage covers theatrical release, national broadcast, all linear TV/CTV, online/digital/Internet video, paid and unpaid social media, OOH, and stills (print, paid/unpaid social, online, and OOH). Option to renew for Year 2 and each subsequent year, not to exceed +10% per talent. Theatrical Release=AMC. They run a free PSA for NFF annually.

Shoot Date is April 30 near Bailey

If you or someone you know is interested, please send a recent family photo (selfies are ok!), a list of everybody’s name and age, and a few sentences about what you love about the outdoors or what is your favorite thing to do in the forest to shauna@sebcasting.com with NFF in the subject line by April 12th. 

Can’t wait to see you play in the woods!!!

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.
items.title: Voices from Another Stage🎤

🎬 **CASTING CALL – TOURING MUSICAL “BRING ME SUNSHINE”**

**TITLE:** Bring Me Sunshine
**LOCATION:** UK-wide (Touring)
**PRODUCTION DATE:** Rehearsals May 25–29 | Tour June 1 – July 31, 2026
**PAID:** £700/week + fuel + accommodation allowance
**PRODUCER:** The Entertainment Providers
**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls)

A **UK touring summer musical** is casting a **solo performer** to lead a high-energy show featuring classics like *La Bamba*, *Viva España*, *Come Fly With Me* and more.

🎭 **ROLE**

**PERFORMER (Solo Show)**
Male or Female | Experienced Vocalist

• Strong vocals + engaging stage presence
• Confident performing solo (one-person show)
• Energetic, charismatic, adaptable
• Passion for live/community performance

🎥 **DETAILS**

• Touring Monday–Friday across the UK
• 2 x 60-minute shows per day
• Must be a **driver with own car**
• Open UK-wide (include location when applying)

💼 **PAY**

• £700 per week
• Fuel covered
• Accommodation allowance provided

📩 **APPLY**

Apply via Actors & Extras (Talent PRO – 1-month FREE trial):

items.text:
HERE’S WHY EVERYONE IS TALKING ABOUT ‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ THE PLAY RIGHT NOW…
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!

ONLY ONE WEEK RUN LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL & REAL PLAY BASED ON TRUE EVENTS!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here - SELLING FAST!

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS JUST £12.50 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — FILMING SATURDAY, APRIL 25TH IN VANCOUVER**

Fourthframe Media is casting for our YouTube social experiment series — unscripted episodes where real people debate, deceive, and compete for a cash prize.

If you've seen Jubilee on YouTube, you know the vibe. We're building something like that right here in Vancouver.

**We're shooting 4 episodes this Saturday and need people for:**
1. 🥩 **6 Vegans vs 1 Secret Meat Eater** — Are you vegan? Or can you fake it? One meat-eater hides among real vegans. If the group catches them, they split the prize. If the liar survives, they take it all.
2. 💰 **Can We Match Your Salary to Your Face?** — People guess each other's income based on first impressions and short conversations. How much does appearance really say about what you earn?
3. 🔀 **Who Is Not a Girl?** — Judges have conversations with contestants without seeing them and decide who's a girl and who's not. Don't worry about your voice; energy and persuasion are your only tools.
4. 💔 **Who Has It Harder — Men or Women?** — An honest, emotional conversation between men and women about the struggles each side faces. No financial debates. Just real talk.

**Details:** 
Location📍: Vancouver, BC 
Date 📅: Saturday, April 25th, 2026 

**🎥 This is volunteer-based. Winners take home a cash prize. **
**🙅 No acting experience needed — just be yourself and bring energy.**

**Apply here:** [https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting](https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting)

Follow us on YouTube/Instagram/TikTok to see our latest episodes.

Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia](https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia)

items.text:
Casting Asian Actors for some Proof-of-Concept scenes I'm shooting in the last week of April.

I'm putting together an Asian street gang (ie. Chinese, Korean, Japanese) project and am wanting to shoot a few short scenes for it. Basically guys and girls who are lounging around the streets of Vancouver, up to no good....

Inspiration are the Hong Kong triad films starring Andy Lau from the 1990's, would love to cast an Andy Lau type lead actor and some female gang leads. Bonus if the actor can speak Cantonese although this is not important.

The two character types are:

• Andy - 20's, independent, street smarts, living life the way he wants.

• Maggie - 20's, beautiful and either innocent or a gangster girl with a headstrong personality.

This is partly proof-of-concept, partly experimental and is on a volunteer basis but you will get footage for your reel.

Don't have exact dates yet but shooting will be between April 22nd to 27th.

Open to union and non-union actors.

If interested, please email me several professional photos (including one headshot and one full length photo) and resume to castingproject604@gmail.comNOSPAM. If you have video, send that along as well.

Thanks for reading.

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn i kobiet ( Gliwice/Katowice )**

 

Szukamy skarbu Zakonu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

Jesteśmy grupą pasjonatów składającą się z osób z różnym doświadczeniem filmowym i miejscem zamieszkania. Spotykamy się 1 2 razy w miesiącu na sesjach testowych i video w wybrane niedziele, ustalane 1 2 tygodnie wcześniej. Projekt realizujemy na terenie Gliwic.

** **

**Kolejne nasze spotkanie to 19.04.26 i 03.05.26 ( Niedziela )   godz. 10:30 - 15:00**

 

Nasza Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje chętną osobę do projektu niekomercyjnego mini serialu osadzonego głównie w 1940 roku. Najlepiej jakby takie osoby były  ** z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrza czy Katowice najdalej.**

 

1 – Rycerz Zakonu Templariuszy wiek: 40 – 50 z zarostem, kwestie po francusku

2 – Ojciec głównej bohaterki ‘’Antoni’’ ( Polak ) wiek: 35 – 40, kilka odcinków kwestie po Polsku

3 – Podoficer niemiecki Waffen SS ( Niemiec ) wiek: 25 – 40, bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku

4 – Zastępczyni szefa Ahnenerbe ( Niemka ) wiek: 25 – 30, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Niemiecku

5 – Oficer francuski wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, 1 scena kwestie po francusku

6 – Wujek głównej bohaterki ‘’Leon’’( Polak ) wiek: 40 – 45, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Polsku

7 – Niemiecki żołnierz wiek: 20 – 40 bez zarostu, 2 odcinki kwestie po niemiecku

8 – Niemiecki żandarm wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku, 2 odcinki

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**044  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Kobieta w stylu lat 30 -  stych  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  kobiety w wieku 20 – 30 do sesji fotograficznej w stylu lat 30 stych. Jedno zdjęcie będzie wykorzystane na obrazie ,które z kolei zostanie powieszone w biurze niemieckiego majora SS. Kostium załatwimy.

 

Szukamy osoby bez permanentnych brwi czy farbowanych włosów, bez kolczyków na twarzy. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic.

** **

**Od kwietnia 2026 ** zaczęliśmy powoli  realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**
items.title: **044  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Kobieta w stylu lat 30 -  stych  (casting on-line )**

items.text:
STATYŚCI- OPEN CALL 

Cześć! Realizujemy III roczny film krótkometrażowy w Szkole Filmowej w Łodzi. Na planie niezbędni będziecie Wy! Poszukujemy statystów do odegrania scen w barze azjatyckim.

Dla zbudowania klimatu filmu i baru goście są bardzo istotni :)

ROLE:

- Dziewczyna w kącie, czytająca tomik poezji

- Mężczyzna w garniturze, intensywnie myślący, patrzący w stolik je makaron, czasem się uśmiecha.

- Dwóch chłopaków w przerwie na obiedzie.

- Trzech czarnoskórych mężczyzn, którzy wspólnie się śmieją i klepią po plecach.

- Stare małżeństwo siedzące w ciszy. Czasem na siebie ciepło spoglądają.

- Trzy osoby o urodzie azjatyckiej.

INFORMACJE PRAKTYCZNE:

Kiedy: 6.05 (szukamy także paru statystów na 7.05)

Godziny: Wstępnie 8-16 (do doprecyzowania bliżej terminu)

Gdzie: Łódź

Wyślij proszę swoje zdjęcie, miejsce dojazdu, dyspozycyjność (6/7?) oraz numer telefonu wraz z mailem w wiadomości prywatnej. 

Oferujemy ciepły posiłek oraz dokumentację fotograficzną z planu.

ZAPRASZAMY NAJSERDECZNIEJ!

items.text:
Looking forward to seeing everyone at the May Festival! 

The sense of community these teens are creating is truly something special if you know any young performers who are looking for more opportunities to entertain, please share this information. In addition to our performances, we also have a monthly teen entertainer, meet up, follow auditions. This is an opportunity for teens to work on personal projects with support and feedback from their peers.

sharedPost.text:
Paid TEEN*
story tellers wanted for May Festival Performance 
$25 stipends will be paid to 4-5 performers 

*Atomic theatre Atomic teen program prides itself on creating performance opportunities for young actors to showcase their skills.  

We have been invited to participate in the The Wheat Ridge Historical Society May festival Saturday, May 9 from 10 to 2 at the Wheat Ridge Historical Society Park 4610 N Robb Street. 

Actors dressed in Pioneer or Victorian fashions wanted to read children’s stories at two separate story hours scheduled around the dancing of the May Pole (active performance time approximately one hour) 

AUDITIONS:  Saturday, May 2 10 AM at the Wheat Ridge Grange  3850 High Court 
To reserve your spot email Deletta at atomictheatreinc@gmail.com   
Subject May Festival 

Prepare a reading of a book or song that fits the pioneer/Victorian or May Day theme

We are able to compensate our performers and support young artists. Thanks in part to community donations and a grant from. Wheat Ridge Cultural Commission

For more information about our youth programming visit www.atomictheatre.org 

Image from our pirate themed story hour featuring Mckenna, Autumn, Forrest , Bodhi , Leona and Thunder one of our Reading With The Rabbits

items.text:
WESTWARD - Student western directed by Nico Guin
A teenage outlaw returns home with a “Wanted —Dead or Alive” poster bearing his face, forcing a silent, heartbreaking reunion with the mother he left behind before he walks into the sunset to face the consequences of a past he can’t escape.

Looking for an older, female actor to play the mother in this 2-3 minute silent western.

This character is in her 40’s or 50’s, is loving yet heartbroken and distraught at the sight of her outlaw son.

Roles are not paid or promised.

We will be shooting during the month of April, and￼ are pretty flexible as it should be only one set. If you are interested or have any questions, you can reach out to me ￼at 914900@dpsk12.net or 7202552717. Thank you!
